mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from wms_sale_order where status = 'audited'
select count(1) from fin_receivable where status != 'paid' and due_date is not null and due_date < sysdate()
select count(1) from wms_stock where (warning_min_qty is not null and quantity < warning_min_qty) or (warning_max_qty is not null and quantity > warning_max_qty)

select date_format(create_time, '%y-%m-%d') as date, ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) as amount from wms_sale_order where status = 'audited' and create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date_format(create_time, '%y-%m-%d') order by date_format(create_time, '%y-%m-%d') asc
select cast(o.customer_id as char) as customer, ifnull(sum(o.total_amount), 0) as amount from wms_sale_order o where o.status = 'audited' group by o.customer_id order by amount desc limit 5
select count(1) from wms_sale_order where status = 'submitted'
select count(1) from wms_inbound where status = 'submitted'
select count(1) from wms_outbound where status = 'submitted'
select cast(notice_id as char) as message_id, notice_title as message_title, create_time as message_time, 'notice' as message_type from sys_notice where status = '0' order by notice_id desc limit 5

select cast(message_id as char) as message_id, message_title, create_time as message_time, message_type, message_level, business_type, cast(business_id as char) as business_id from biz_message where status = '0' and message_type = 'stock_warning' order by message_id desc limit 5

select cast(receivable_id as char) as message_id, concat('应收到期提醒，销售单：', sale_order_id) as message_title, due_date as message_time, 'receivable' as message_type, 'sale_order' as business_type, cast(sale_order_id as char) as business_id from fin_receivable where status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and due_date is not null order by due_date asc limit 5

select cast(message_id as char) as message_id, message_title, create_time as message_time, message_type, message_level, business_type, cast(business_id as char) as business_id from biz_message where status = '0' and message_type = 'sale_order_audit' order by message_id desc limit 5
